purpose: Compact routing rules for registering governed outputs and result artifacts.
must_register_when: a governed chat creates a durable plan, contract, registry entry, report or artifact
a governed task creates or updates repository files
a workflow produces an evidence bundle or generated artifact
a PR, issue, workflow or mirror update changes canonical project state
a document, spreadsheet, presentation, PDF or generated file is produced for user use
a result changes startup, runtime, capability, memory, evidence or operational governance

evidence_rules.repository_file: record repository path and commit SHA or PR reference
evidence_rules.workflow_artifact: record workflow run id, artifact id and digest when available
evidence_rules.local_generated_file: record sandbox path and SHA-256 when handed to user
evidence_rules.external_document: record source URL or connector reference when allowed
evidence_rules.chat_only_output: record conversation/task reference when it materially changes governed operating state

problem_solution_interlock.if_output_contains_new_operational_lesso: also create or update problem/solution memory
problem_solution_interlock.if_failure_or_blocker_discovered: create problem/solution ledger entry or safe overlay
